message:
🐛 Fix Kagenti cards showing empty state in live mode (#671)

Kagenti cards are demo-only (marked in DEMO_DATA_CARDS) and should always
show demo data when no real Kagenti resources exist. Previously, when the
agent returned an empty array (no Kagenti CRDs installed), the hooks would
use the empty array instead of falling back to demo data.

This fix adds a check for non-empty results before using live data,
ensuring demo-only cards display demo content when clusters have no
Kagenti resources.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
